upnext.title: Up next
upnext.emptyText: Follow your first shows and your next episodes will show up here, ready to be checked off.
upnext.emptyImportCta: Coming from TV Time? Import your history
upnext.installBanner: Install Rewatch on your home screen

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.onlyDaysWithReleases: Only days with a release are shown
calendar.noUpcoming: No upcoming releases for your shows

profile.title: Profile
profile.importText: Get your full history back: request your export from TV Time, then drop the file here.
profile.importPendingLink: {{count}} movies from a previous import to resolve ›
profile.notificationsHint: A push the day an episode airs
profile.notificationsDenied: Notifications blocked by the browser — check the site permissions.
profile.testNotificationFailed: Nothing delivered — re-enable notifications on this device.
profile.purgeHint: Watched episodes, movies, followed shows, ratings — irreversible
profile.emailModalText: It's only used to recover your account (forgot password). A verification link will be sent.
profile.emailModalSaved: Email saved — a verification link is on its way ✓
profile.emailModalTaken: An account already exists with this address
profile.passwordMismatch: Confirmation doesn't match the new password
profile.passwordError: Current password incorrect or new one too short (8 min.)
profile.purgeModalText: All your watched episodes, movies, followed shows, ratings and watchlists will be permanently erased. Your account stays, but starts from scratch. There is no way back.
profile.exportHint: Full history as JSON — your data belongs to you
profile.tmdbAttribution: This product uses the TMDB API but is not endorsed or certified by TMDB.
profile.deleteAccountHint: Account, history, everything — erased for good
profile.deleteModalText: Your account and everything it contains will be permanently erased. There is no way back. Tip: export your data first if you want to keep a copy.
profile.traktRowHint: Import, export or mirror your history with Trakt.tv
profile.importRowHint: Bring your full TV Time history back

auth.tagline: Keep tracking your shows after TV Time. Your next episodes, your calendar and your stats — all in one place.
auth.createAccountText: A username, an email, a password — the email is only used to recover your account.
auth.forgotText: Enter your account's email address and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotSent: If a verified account exists with this address, a reset email is on its way.
auth.emailTaken: An account already exists with this address
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts — try again in a minute
auth.validationHint: Username 3-30 chars (letters, digits, _ . -), valid email, password 8 chars minimum
auth.registrationClosed: Signups are closed on this instance

tokens.verifiedText: Your email is confirmed — account recovery is now active.
tokens.invalidText: Request a new verification email from your profile.
tokens.resetDone: Password changed ✓ — log in with the new one.
tokens.resetError: Invalid or expired link — request a new email from "Forgot password"

gate.title: Verify your email to continue
gate.text: The 7-day grace period without verification is over. Your account and all your history are intact — just click the link you received by email to unlock access.
gate.tooMany: Too many requests — try again in a minute

pushPrompt.title: Never miss a release
pushPrompt.text: Get a notification the day an episode of your shows airs.
pushPrompt.installFirst: To get notified when episodes air, first install Rewatch on your home screen.

admin.title: Console
admin.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete “{{username}}” and all their history?

ops.tmdbKeyHint: v3 key or v4 token — themoviedb.org/settings/api
ops.wizWelcomeTitle: You are the operator of this instance
ops.wizWelcomeText: First account created: this account is the administrator. A few settings and the instance is ready for you and yours. Everything stays editable later in the console.
ops.wizStepTmdb: Metadata comes from TMDB. Create a free key and paste it here.
ops.wizStepInstance: The public URL is used in email links. Signups can stay closed if this is a personal instance.
ops.wizStepEmail: Optional: without SMTP, emails (verification, password reset) are disabled and links show up in the server logs.
ops.wizStepPush: Release notifications use Web Push. Keys are generated in one click and must not change afterwards.
ops.legalHostHint: leave empty to hide the legal page
ops.legalContactHint: leave empty to hide the legal page
ops.traktHelp: Optional. Lets users sync with Trakt.tv: create a (free) API app at trakt.tv/oauth/applications with redirect uri urn:ietf:wg:oauth:2.0:oob.

tvhelp.title: Get your TV Time data
tvhelp.intro: TV Time lets you download everything you tracked — episodes, movies, ratings — as a single file. Five minutes, all from your browser, then Rewatch imports the whole thing.
tvhelp.deadlineTitle: TV Time shuts down on July 15, 2026
tvhelp.deadlineText: After that date your data is deleted for good. Export it now, even if you import it here later.
tvhelp.step1Title: Open the TV Time export page
tvhelp.step1Text: The official export tool works from any browser, phone included:
tvhelp.step2Title: Sign in with your TV Time account
tvhelp.step2Text: Use the email and password of your TV Time account.
tvhelp.step2TipLabel: Signed up with Facebook or Google?
tvhelp.step2Tip: You probably never set a password. Use “Forgot your password?” on that page with your account email to create one.
tvhelp.step3Text: Press “Generate GDPR Data”. It takes a few minutes; the page updates by itself — keep it open.
tvhelp.step4Text: When it is ready, press “Download”. You get a file named gdpr-data.zip — keep it as is, no need to unzip it.
tvhelp.howTitle: Don't have your export file yet? Here's how:
tvhelp.step5TextInline: Drop the zip in the box at the top of this page. Episodes, shows, movies, ratings and watchlist come back in a few minutes.

legal.title: Privacy & legal notice
legal.operator: This Rewatch instance is run on a personal, non-commercial basis: no ads, no trackers, no analytics, and your data is never sold or shared.
legal.dataText: A username, an email address (only used to recover your account), a hashed password, and the watch history you build or import: shows followed, episodes and movies watched, ratings, watchlist. Nothing else. Data is kept as long as your account exists.
legal.rightsText: Everything is self-service from your profile: export your full history as JSON (access and portability), change your email or password (rectification), delete your history or your entire account (erasure). For any other request, contact the operator.
legal.cookiesText: A single session cookie keeps you signed in. It is strictly necessary for the service, so no consent banner is required. There are no third-party cookies.
legal.sourceText: Rewatch is free software under the AGPL-3.0 license. The source code of this service is available on GitHub.

install.title: Install as an app
install.intro: Rewatch works like a native app: an icon on your home screen, full screen, and push notifications when new episodes air. Two minutes, no app store.
install.alreadyInstalled: You're already using the installed app — nothing to do.
install.nativeDone: Installed! Look for the Rewatch icon.
install.iosStep1Text: The install option only exists in Safari.
install.iosSafariWarnLabel: Coming from Instagram or another app?
install.iosSafariWarn: Their built-in browser can't install apps. Open the link in the real Safari first (⋯ menu → Open in browser).
install.iosStep2Text: The square with an arrow, at the bottom of Safari.
install.iosStep3Text: Scroll the list if needed. Confirm with "Add" at the top right.
install.androidStep1Text: On {{host}}, tap the three dots at the top right of Chrome.
install.androidStep2Text: The Rewatch icon lands on your home screen; the app opens full screen.
install.desktopStep1Title: Click the install icon in the address bar
install.desktopStep1Text: In Chrome or Edge, a small install icon appears at the right end of the address bar. Click it and confirm.
install.stepPushText: Open the installed app, go to Profile → Release notifications, and accept the permission. You'll get a push the day a new episode airs.
install.iosPushNote: On iPhone, notifications require iOS 16.4 or later and only work from the installed app — not from a Safari tab. That's also why the toggle does nothing in the browser.

trakt.intro: Trakt.tv is the reference tracking service — Plex, Kodi and many apps feed it automatically. Connect your account to move your history both ways.
trakt.notConfigured: Trakt is not set up on this instance
trakt.notConfiguredAdmin: Create a free API app on trakt.tv/oauth/applications, then paste its client id and secret in the admin console (Settings → Trakt).
trakt.notConfiguredUser: Ask the administrator of this instance to enable the Trakt integration.
trakt.connectText: Connect your Trakt account to import your history, export Rewatch to Trakt, or mirror your check-ins live.
trakt.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect your Trakt account? The mirror stops; nothing is deleted on either side.
trakt.importText: Brings your full Trakt history into Rewatch: episodes and movies with their watch dates, ratings, watchlist. Safe to run again — no duplicates.
trakt.exportText: Pushes your Rewatch history to Trakt with the original dates. What Trakt already has is skipped.
trakt.mirrorText: Every episode or movie you check in Rewatch is sent to Trakt as it happens (and removed when you uncheck).
trakt.exportDoneDetail: {{episodes}} episodes and {{movies}} movies added on Trakt.
trakt.connectError: Could not reach Trakt. Try again — if it persists, check the client id/secret in the admin console.
